default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli and Cal Hunter to explore potential mentorship and collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Cal is a recent college graduate with experience in video production, seeking mentorship and guidance for his career](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Marcel, with extensive experience in marketing and AI, offered insights on business growth, AI integration, and potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Both identified opportunities in B2B video content creation, storytelling, and leveraging AI for business processes](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Marcel expressed willingness to mentor Cal and potentially work together on future projects](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

## Topics

### Cal's Background and Experience

  - [College tennis player who started making highlight videos for friends during COVID](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Worked with larger teams, including NBA's San Antonio Spurs and NFL](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Currently working with Steph and Ayesha Curry's foundation in the Bay Area](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Seeking to turn video production hobby into a career](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Double majored in Business Administration and Communication](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)

### Marcel's Background and Expertise

  - [Originally from Brazil, grew up in Texas, attended UT Austin](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Started with web and graphic design, built content programs for large companies](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Worked with startups in the Bay Area (HashiCorp, Service Titan, Skill AI, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Recently left CMO position at DeepGram to start his own AI workflow company](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New company reached $2 million in annual revenue within 5 months, with clients like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### AI Workflows and Applications

  - [Marcel's company focuses on building AI workflows for various applications](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Demonstrated a podcast content creation workflow using AI](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of becoming "AI-native" as a valuable skill set](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Discussed potential applications of AI in video editing and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Business Growth Strategies

  - [Importance of setting up an LLC for tax benefits](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Discussed the trade-offs between joining a company vs. building your own business](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Emphasized the need for systems, repeatability, and scaling processes](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Suggested creating self-reinforcing cycles and increasing "sellable surface area"](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Marcel offered to be a client for Cal's video services](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Discussed possibilities in B2B video content creation](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Mentioned upcoming office space and events as potential video projects](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Shared examples of successful video content strategies in the B2B space](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Career Development Advice

  - [Importance of continuous learning and asking for help](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Balancing naivety with acquiring necessary knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Focusing on mastery, distribution, and monetization](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Exploring ways to scale operations and delegate tasks](https://fathom.video/share/WDgx3wcaSq12fmaN_V1KHsspyro35grY?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

## Next Steps

  - Cal to review links and resources shared by Marcel
  - Cal to consider B2B video content opportunities
  - Cal to explore setting up an LLC
  - Cal to follow up with Marcel after his trip to Brazil (after October 22nd)
  - Both to consider potential collaboration projects and mentorship arrangement

action_items.description: Get LLC set up for video business
Review video links shared (Transform conf, RB2B, Audience Plus, Randem)
Text Marcel's phone number (given in chat)
Draft potential opportunities to collaborate w/ Marcel's company, send note
